name: Veterinary Consultation
title_instruction: Summarize this veterinary consultation in max 6 words

sections.title: Patient
sections.instruction: Animal name, species, breed, age, sex, and weight if mentioned

sections.title: Presenting Complaint
sections.instruction: Owner's description of the problem and reason for visit

sections.title: History
sections.instruction: Relevant medical history, vaccination status, diet, lifestyle

sections.title: Examination Findings
sections.instruction: Physical examination findings, vitals, and clinical observations

sections.title: Medications
sections.instruction: Medications prescribed with dosage and administration instructions

sections.title: Follow-Up
sections.instruction: Follow-up instructions and return visit timeline

sections.title: Owner Advice
sections.instruction: Home care instructions and advice given to the owner
